Name: ChrModelParam
Description: Determines various parameters for character models.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Texture Memory Type
Fields.Description: Memory type used by model textures.

Fields.Name: Camera Dither Fade ID
Fields.Description: Camera fade parameter ID (-1 refer to material, 0: do not disappear, 1 parameter ID)

Fields.Name: No Raytracing
Fields.Description: If OFF, then character model will be included in raytracing scene. If ON, then character is skipped.

Fields.Name: Raytracing Culling Mode
Fields.Description: Culling mode applied when drawing raytracing. If it is set to 'Auto', it will be the default value set in the program.
